title: Floral Vietnamese Peppercorn Stir-fry
description: A quick-fix low-carb-friendly floral and crispy Vietnamese dish featuring peppercorns, whisked for a delightful aroma.

ingredients.name: Peppercorns
ingredients.notes: Use black peppercorns for a classic Vietnamese flavor.

ingredients.name: Chili flakes or Thai bird chilies
Fish sauce (optional, for flavoring)
ingredients.notes: To enhance the dish's umami and aroma.

instructions: Whisk garlic cloves, fresh ginger, fish sauce (if using), chili flakes, and peppercorns together in a mixing bowl.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat. Once hot, add the whisked mixture to the pan.
Stir quickly until fragrant, about 30 seconds, ensuring the peppers become crispy on their edges.
Remove from heat immediately and let cool slightly before serving.
